items.title: 🆕 @theathletic.com
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
🆕 @theathletic.com 

Normally I have a whole list of players I like to highlight going into some quiet LA Clippers draft that doesn't feature a top-20 pick

This is not that draft. And this is a different kind of preview.
